title: Fancy Chests
description: Fully client-side chest animation changing tool
body:
# Fully client-side chest animation changing tool (See Below) ![Demo](https://media.giphy.com/media/i0w7evueaqNLBLfUPT/giphy.gif) ## Custom Configuration Features ![Configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3728ae4d8c2b142060c72431130bd2decb7872f1.png) **Useful Chest Animation Trick**
Want to disable chest animations entirely? Set Open Position to 0. **Important Notes** - MixinBootstrap is required only for 1.14 Forge versions - Cloth Config API is required for the Fabric editions of the mod. It is not needed for the Forge editions - This can be used on vanilla server - Fancy Chests supports most mods which add chests (1.17+). **Follow the link below and use code "JACKBUSTERS" at checkout for 25% off server hosting.** [![BisectHosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/ba99da02-fd57-4ccc-89a5-9a5bba0922d2.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/jackbusters?r=Fancy+Chests+Modrinth)
